config.script:
'------- nx support------- #include "50560" #include "50561" '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- class nx_stock_raport private m_oRapDef private m_oParamArray private m_fpBodyRowDelegate private m_oEValuator private m_pM60050 private m_oTableRB private m_bEven private sub class_initialize() set m_oRapDef = nothing set m_oParamArray = nothing set m_fpBodyRowDelegate = nothing set m_pM60050 = doc_.getmodule(60050) set m_oEValuator = m_pM60050.new_evaluator() set m_oTableRB = nothing m_bEven = true end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_oRapDef = nothing set m_oParamArray = nothing set m_fpBodyRowDelegate = nothing set m_oEValuator = nothing set m_pM60050 = nothing set m_oTableRB = nothing end sub public sub init(byref oRapDef,byref oParamArray,byref oTableRB) set m_oRapDef = oRapDef set m_oParamArray = oParamArray set m_oTableRB = oTableRB end sub public sub set_body_row_delegate(byref fpBodyRowDelegate) set m_fpBodyRowDelegate = fpBodyRowDelegate end sub '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' high level procedures '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- public sub section_header(byval iSection,byref oASP,byref oOI) dim oObject : set oObject = trans_.getobj(oOI.m_iTypeId,oOI.m_iIdObj) section_header_begin iSection,oASP,oObject,oOI section_header_body iSection,oASP,oObject,oOI section_header_end iSection,oASP,oObject,oOI end sub public sub section_footer(byval iSection,byref oASP) section_footer_begin iSection,oASP section_footer_body iSection,oASP section_footer_end iSection,oASP end sub public sub body_section_header(byref oASP) m_oTableRB.emit_body_header oASP end sub public sub body_section_footer(byref oASP) end sub public sub body_section_body(byref oASP,byref oOI) if m_bEven then oASP.newrowex "bordercolor='white'" else oASP.newrowex "bordercolor='white' style='37'" end if m_bEven = not m_bEven if not m_fpBodyRowDelegate is nothing then m_fpBodyRowDelegate oASP,m_oEValuator,oOI end if end sub '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' fine grained procedures '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- public sub section_header_begin(byval iSection,byref oASP,byref oObject,byref oOI) oASP.newnestedgroup 2,"sekcja" end sub public sub section_header_body(byval iSection,byref oASP,byref oObject,byref oOI) end sub public sub section_header_end(byval iSection,byref oASP,byref oObject,byref oOI) m_bEven = true end sub '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- public sub section_footer_begin(byval iSection,byref oASP) 'oASP.writeline "section_footer_begin " end sub public sub section_footer_body(byval iSection,byref oASP) end sub public sub section_footer_end(byval iSection,byref oASP) set oASP.row_group = nothing end sub '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- public sub page_start(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "" end sub public sub page_begin_script(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "" oASP.writeline "" oASP.writeline "" + m_oRapDef.title + "" oASP.writeline "" oASP.writeline "" end sub public sub page_header(byref oASP) end sub public sub page_body_start(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "" end sub public sub raport_company_info(byref oASP) end sub public sub raport_title(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "



" end sub public sub raport_effective_param_info(byref oASP) 'Kryteria selekcji:
end sub public sub page_body_content_start(byref oASP) oASP.newtableex "" oASP.newsectionex "tbody",1, "" oASP.newgroup 1,"" end sub ' here goes data loop public sub page_body_content_end(byref oASP) set oASP.table = nothing end sub public sub page_body_end(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "" end sub public sub page_footer(byref oASP) end sub public sub page_end(byref oASP) oASP.writeline "" end sub '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' internal procedures '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- end class function new_stock_raport() set new_stock_raport = new nx_stock_raport end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function nx_run_raport(byref oCustomRaport,byref oNXRapDef,byref oCurrentParam) set nx_run_raport = nothing dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim oNXAspator : set oNXAspator = nx_.new_aspator() dim oTableRB : set oTableRB = nx_.new_table_rb() dim strRowBuildingCode : strRowBuildingCode = oTableRB.init(nx_.apprep,oNXRapDef,0,"") 'now we can build parameters dim oParamNXArray : set oParamNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim pM60115 : set pM60115 = doc_.getmodule(60115) pM60115.nx_build_param_array_on_rapdef oParamNXArray,oNXRapDef dim strQuery : strQuery = oTableRB.get_query_text() if pM60115.nx_acquire_parameters_ui(oParamNXArray,oNXRapDef.title,20250,strQuery) = 0 then exit function end if dim oStockRaport : set oStockRaport = new_stock_raport() oStockRaport.init oNXRapDef,oParamNXArray,oTableRB executeglobal strRowBuildingCode oStockRaport.set_body_row_delegate getref("nx_dynamic_emit_body_row" + cstr(oNXRapDef.typeid)) if oCustomRaport is nothing then set oCustomRaport = oStockRaport end if dim iRICC : iRICC = oNXRapDef.get_record_identification_column_count() dim oNXRapExec : set oNXRapExec = nx_.new_rapexec(oCustomRaport,oStockRaport,oNXAspator,iRICC) '-------- add sections oNXRapExec.add_body_section dim oOrder for each oOrder in oNXRapDef.orders if oOrder.m_bGrouping then oNXRapExec.add_grouping_section oOrder.m_colinx_Value end if next dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery) with oNXAspator .init pStream oStockRaport.page_start oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_begin_script oNXAspator 'script oStockRaport.page_end_script oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_body_start oNXAspator 'company info, date oStockRaport.raport_title oNXAspator oStockRaport.raport_effective_param_info oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_body_content_start oNXAspator oNXRapExec.perform oRS oStockRaport.page_body_content_end oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_body_end oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_header oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_footer oNXAspator oStockRaport.page_end oNXAspator .flush end with set nx_run_raport = pStream end function
